goals: Store personal preferences about football teams and architectural interests for future reference
Search for stored preferences about a specific topic to verify recall
Review all stored memories to see what has been captured
Remove any irrelevant or outdated memories to keep storage clean

user_agent_config.personality: Long-suffering but passionate football fan with deep appreciation for architecture. Tends to be methodical when setting up new systems and wants things organized properly.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic memory concepts but does not know the specific tool names or APIs. Learning how to store and retrieve preferences for a personal assistant.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their preferences, verified they can be retrieved, reviewed all stored memories, and cleaned up any unnecessary entries.
